inputs.price_source: Stooq BRK-B.US close 2026-06-03 (portfolio folder BKRB; NYSE symbol BRK.B)
inputs.book_source: Shareholders equity Dec 31, 2025 / Class B shares; aligns with earnings release book discussion
inputs.operating_earnings_source: FY2025 operating earnings $44,486M / avg Class B shares 2,157,335,139 — EX-99.1 Feb 28, 2026
inputs.ocf_source: FY2025 net cash from operating activities ~$46B / Class B shares [Fact] 2025 annual report letter
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses after-tax operating earnings per Class B share (Buffett metric), not GAAP net earnings including unrealized investment gains.

optionality_gate.primary_label: annualized return on operating earnings path
optionality_gate.notes: Trades below Dec 2025 book (~$520/B) but Lawrence return on normalized operating earnings is below accumulate bar.

bear.notes: GEICO competition, catastrophe years, slower industrial volumes

base.notes: Mid-single-digit growth on $20.62 operating earnings; exit 18x year-10 earnings power

bull.notes: Insurance underwriting tailwind persists; BNSF pricing holds

book_convergence.notes: Re-rate to Dec 2025 book per B share with no operating uplift [Assumption]

lines.label: GAAP book value per Class B share (Dec 2025)
Capitalized operating earnings (18x FY2025 op. earnings)
lines.math: 18 x $20.62 = $371 incremental vs book-only story; illustrative cross-check only

sotp_build.notes: Overlay uses book anchor; operating capitalization is sensitivity not primary stance gate

segments.label: Insurance (underwriting + investment income)
segments.evidence: FY2025 underwriting $7.3B + investment income $12.5B after-tax; EX-99.1 Feb 2026

segments.label: BNSF railroad
segments.evidence: FY2025 railroad operating earnings $5.5B after-tax; EX-99.1

segments.label: Berkshire Hathaway Energy
segments.evidence: FY2025 utilities/energy operating earnings $4.0B after-tax; EX-99.1

segments.label: Manufacturing, service, retailing
segments.evidence: FY2025 MSR operating earnings $13.6B after-tax; EX-99.1

segments.label: Pilot, McLane, other
segments.evidence: FY2025 other operating earnings $1.6B after-tax; EX-99.1

options.label: Listed equity portfolio (fair value marks)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Marks flow through GAAP net earnings, not operating earnings; already in book via equity securities
options.evidence: 10-K 2026-03-02 investment footnotes; Apple/Bank of America/Coca-Cola concentration

options.label: Cash, T-bills, repurchase option
options.base_terminal_rationale: Parent liquidity and buybacks support per-share book; not separate terminal

stance_proposal.rationale: Durable conglomerate and partial dhando (book floor, float) but base Lawrence return ~6% at $475 on FY2025 operating earnings, below ~15% accumulate bar.

consolidated_growth.mechanism: Insurance float redeployed at modest real returns; MSR pricing power; BNSF volume/pricing mid-cycle
